creator: bugzilla.freebsd@omnilan.de
text:
Hmm, its very likely that I have had the problem with nullmailer < r371088.
I remember that I manually fixed the missing fifo the weekend before the last, probably saturday (Oct, 18th). And my ports tree could have been very well some days old.
Haven't had time to look at the port until today, and haven't checked after updating portstree. But I was somewhat astonsihed today when inspecting pkg-plist...
Nevertheless, I'm still happy with the changes :-) One possible improovement came to my mind: The sednmail(and periodic.conf) disabling hints could be made $OSVERSION dependent.
But -current users will know they dont have sendmail anymore, all others should benefit from the additional message; at least as reminder ;-)

Thanks,

-Harry
